summary: Global instrument search (web search bar) — resolve name/theme to tickers.
Account-wide DRIP state {drip_enabled}. PATCH {"drip_enabled":bool} to toggle (write-mutate).
Per-instrument DRIP settings list for an account (results[]).
Margin/PDT settings {leverage,day_trades,advanced_buying_power}. PUT {"day_trades_protection":bool} for PDT protection (write-mutate).
High-yield cash sweep state {sweep_enrolled}. POST {"sweep_enrollment_action":"unenroll"} to disable (write-mutate).
Enroll high-yield cash sweep. POST {"account_number":"..."} (pairs with an agreements/v2/sign).
Sign a Robinhood agreement. POST {agreement_id,sha256}. Used by enroll flows.
